mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qnas (user_id, product_id,qna_type,is_private, title, content) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{product_id},#{qna_type},#{is_private}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT q.*,p.name AS product_name,p.image_l AS image_l FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON q.product_id = p.product_id WHERE q.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY q.qna_id DESC
SELECT q.*,p.name AS product_name,p.image_l AS image_l FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON q.product_id = p.product_id WHERE q.qna_id = #{qna_id}
SELECT q.*, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON q.product_id = p.product_id WHERE q.user_id = #{user_id} AND (q.answer IS NULL OR q.answer = '') ORDER BY q.qna_id DESC
SELECT q.*, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON q.product_id = p.product_id WHERE q.user_id = #{user_id} AND q.answer IS NOT NULL AND q.answer != '' ORDER BY q.qna_id DESC

SELECT q.*, p.name AS product_name, p.image_l AS image_l, u.name AS user_name, u.nick_name AS nick_name FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON q.product_id = p.product_id JOIN users u ON q.user_id = u.user_id
AND (q.answer IS NULL OR q.answer = '')
AND q.answer IS NOT NULL AND q.answer != ''
AND ( q.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR q.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY q.qna_id DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM qnas WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND (answer IS NULL OR answer = '')
SELECT count(*) FROM qnas WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND answer IS NOT NULL AND answer != ''
SELECT DISTINCT p.product_id,p.name AS product_name FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON q.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} ORDER BY p.name ASC
SELECT q.*, u.name AS user_name, u.nick_name AS nick_name, u.photo_name AS photo_name FROM qnas q JOIN users u ON q.user_id = u.user_id WHERE q.product_id = #{product_id} ORDER BY q.qna_id DESC

SELECT q.*, p.name AS product_name, p.image_l AS image_l, u.name AS user_name, u.nick_name AS nick_name, DATE_FORMAT(q.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created_at_text, NULL AS option_name FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON q.product_id = p.product_id JOIN users u ON q.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} ORDER BY q.qna_id DESC
